title: Lifestyle Apparel Photography for the St. Augustine Amphitheatre
excerpt: Go behind the scenes of our lifestyle apparel shoot for the St. Augustine Amphitheatre's merch collection, filmed at Anastasia State Park.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Group of models wearing St Augustine Amphitheatre merch lounging in grass at golden hour

banner.alt: Models wearing Amp merch hanging from oak tree at Anastasia State Park

content.alt: Model in Amp sweatshirt with natural sun flare at Anastasia State Park
content.caption: Natural light and real moments - the essence of lifestyle photography

content.alt: Group of models holding hands showing back of St Augustine Amphitheatre merch designs
content.caption: Lifestyle photography tells a story - not just shows a product

content.alt: Detail shot of St Augustine Amphitheatre hoodie and t-shirt designs
content.caption: Product details still matter - we capture both the vibe and the merch

content.alt: Candid lifestyle shot of model in vintage Amphitheatre ringer tee with coffee
content.caption: Candid moments connect customers to the lifestyle your brand represents
